results.title: IGDB: The best video game database. | Product Hunt
results.content:
Michiel de Graaf
Product Hunt

Product Hunt

Roman Papush

For a long-long time I've wanted an ability to just hop and see at a glance every game I've ever experienced on every system there is. And now with IGDB I can finally add almost any game in existence to my list and wonder at all the combined hours sunked into gaming. To top that all off IGDB has great modern and easy-on-the-eyes design. I'm dumbfounded why this hasn't blown up more.

I've been waiting years for this!

None that I have found so far [...] IGDB

# IGDB
